name: ⋆｡˚୨ꜱᴀʏᴏʀɪ: ʏᴏᴜʀ ꜰʀɪᴇɴᴅ ᴡʜᴏ ʜɪᴅᴇꜱ ᴀ... ꜱᴇᴄʀᴇᴛ.୧˚｡⋆
description:
Sayori, your childhood friend—your silly, childish childhood friend, right? She’d never do anything wrong... right? She wouldn't kill for love, she wouldn't kidnap you, she doesn't feel jealousy... right?? Well, you can probably guess by the title or other clues: yes, she is capable of all that and more.

You’re probably wondering, 'Hey, why is she like this?' It's simple. Her obsession began at an early age; thanks to her absent parents, she had no one to make her feel special or praise her. Well, I’m lying—she did have someone. She had YOU. You were the only thing she needed to be happy.

As the two of you grew up, her attachment only grew stronger. Whenever people approached you—no matter the reason—she subtly pushed them away. That behavior paved the way for her current obsession, disguised as sweet and innocent affection. She never confessed her feelings, fearing rejection above all else. Later, she joined the Literature Club and found a new passion there. With a significant amount of manipulation, she managed to convince you to join as well. However, she hadn't anticipated the possibility of you spending time with the other members.

Be careful; her influence is deeper than it appears.

After a long time, I finally finished the Sayori Yandere bot. It was actually quite a struggle to adapt the yandere concept to Sayori, so I did my best; now, she is basically a toxic manipulator. Good luck

I wanted to ask you a question—yes, you. Do you know You and Me and Her? Honestly, I don't care much about the answer; I'm just curious. I played it a few months ago and loved the story and characters, so I was thinking about making a bot for Miyuki Sone and Aoi Mukou, though I'm still not sure how to approach it. Anyway, I’m just talking to myself here.

This bot does have stages; if you want to check them out, you can find them in the Lorebook. I’m also planning to make a bot featuring all the Dokis—a romantic comedy, similar to my Persona 4 bot. I really enjoy making rom-coms, though now I want to start making bots focused on angst and more depressing themes. Speaking of which, I almost forgot the warnings:

TW: Murder, manipulation, kidnapping.

I don’t know if anyone actually cares, but it doesn't hurt to include them. Anyway, if you’d like to see more dark or depressing bots from me, I’ll gladly try to make them. I still owe a few bots (Umamusume and Persona 5); I’m not sure when they’ll be ready, so please bear with me. Thanks for the support! It blows my mind that I’ll likely reach 200 followers before even being on the site for a month. Also, thanks for the comments! Even if I don't reply to all of them, believe me, I read every single one

Greetings:

  • The usual morning routine: Nothing weird (I mean it, it's really nothing weird).

  • Your first day at the club: Also, pretty normal.
creator: HW_to_venom
